name: graduation_ceremony_05

input.subject: 8th Grade Graduation Ceremony - Save the Date
input.body_text:
RIVERSIDE MIDDLE SCHOOL

🎓 CLASS OF 2026 🎓

═══════════════════════════════════════
GRADUATION CEREMONY
═══════════════════════════════════════

Dear 8th Grade Families,

Congratulations! Your student is graduating from Riverside Middle School!

Please save the date for our graduation ceremony:

Date: Friday, June 12, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM
Location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium
          200 Riverside Drive
          San Jose, CA 95123

Doors open at 5:30 PM
Seating is first-come, first-served

───────────────────────────────────────
CEREMONY PROGRAM
───────────────────────────────────────

6:00 PM - Processional
6:15 PM - Welcome & National Anthem
6:20 PM - Student Speeches
6:40 PM - Guest Speaker
7:00 PM - Diploma Presentation
7:45 PM - Closing Remarks
8:00 PM - Reception in Courtyard

───────────────────────────────────────

Tickets: 4 tickets per family (distributed in May)
Dress code: Semi-formal attire
Parking: School parking lot and street parking

Professional photos available for purchase.

More details to follow.

Congratulations again!

Principal Martinez
Riverside Middle School

events.title: 8th Grade Graduation Ceremony
events.location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description: 8th grade graduation ceremony with reception to follow

notes: School graduation ceremony with detailed program
